## Estimation

### Size

- [ ] XS - Less than 1 hour
- [ ] S - 1-4 hours
- [ ] M - 1-2 days
- [ ] L - 3-5 days
- [ ] XL - 1+ week (consider breaking down)

### Priority

- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Must be done immediately
- [ ] 🟠 High - Must be done this sprint
- [ ] 🟡 Medium - Should be done soon
- [ ] 🟢 Low - Can be scheduled later
